$comment: Approved MCP servers for this workspace. In an enterprise, this file is owned by the platform team and changes go through the same review as code. Placeholders only — no real hostnames or credentials belong in this file, ever. Secrets are referenced via ${input:...} prompts or environment variables, never inlined.

github.$comment: Official GitHub MCP server — issues, PRs, code search within org policy.

internal-api-catalog.$comment: EXAMPLE of an internal enterprise server: replace with your platform team's approved endpoint. Auth flows through your IdP; the token is requested at connect time, not stored here.

local-docs.$comment: EXAMPLE of a stdio server running locally against checked-in docs.
